hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'xcodebuild[^|]*test'; then killall screenshot 2>/dev/null; killall "Screenshot Bro" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$path" | grep -q 'Localizable\.xcstrings$'; then echo 'Localizable.xcstrings is generated by tools/translate_catalog.py and tools/translate_popular_languages.py. Edit code with String(localized:) and run those scripts instead of editing the xcstrings file directly. If you really need a hand-edit, ask the user to confirm.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
